prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain recalibration targeting the **Li L6-TGDI 1.5L I4 + 3DHT P1+P3 hybrid system (engine code: *LF15T*)**, utilizing a **Motec M150 ECU** with custom firmware to optimize torque split between the 1.5L turbocharged engine (stock: 245 PS) and the front/rear electric motors (P1: 130 kW, P3: 100 kW). Aggressive torque vectoring maps for the **BYD Blade Battery (42.8 kWh)** to reduce 0-100 km/h time from 5.5s to 4.2s via preemptive electric torque fill during turbo lag.

Forced induction upgrade with a **Garrett GT2260S turbocharger (62mm compressor, 56mm turbine)** on the LF15T engine, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **PTP Turbo Blankets** to maintain exhaust gas velocity. Supporting mods include **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** to target 1.4 bar (20.3 psi) peak boost, yielding ~320 PS from the ICE alone.

Chassis reinforcement via **Li Auto OEM-sourced carbon-fiber torque box inserts (part #L6-5010-CF)** and a **Full-Race Motorsports 4-point roll cage (T45 steel, MIG-welded)** to stiffen the unibody by 35%. Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30mm drop)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF9078K)** for the rear multi-link setup, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for hybrid regenerative braking compatibility.
estetica: Custom **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Li L6-specific, 50mm flares)** with **Seibon carbon-fiber fenders (pre-preg autoclave, 1.2mm thickness)** to accommodate **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x10.5 +35, 21x12.5 +40)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30R20, 325/25R21)**. Aggressive aero balance achieved via a **Voltex Type-5 rear wing (3D-printed aluminum uprights, 1,200mm span)** and **Li Auto OEM front splitter extension (carbon-fiber, part #L6-5110-CF)** with **Aimoli carbon canards**.

Hybrid-specific visual cues including **Novitec-style LED daytime running lights (Osram LEDriving SL 150, 6,000K)** integrated into the grille, **custom battery cooling vents (laser-cut aluminum, part #L6-BATT-COOL)** on the rear quarter panels, and a **removable carbon-fiber hood (Rocket Bunny, 50% weight reduction)** with **functional NACA ducts** feeding the **Garrett turbo intercooler (GReddy Type-25, 12-row core)**.

Interior transformation with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon-Kevlar shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, paired with a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter)** and **AiM MXS 1.2 Strada dash (CAN bus integration for hybrid telemetry)**. Exterior accents include **3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (Xpel PPF on high-impact zones)** and **Anzo USA LED taillights (sequential turn signals, 3,000-lumen output)** with **custom hybrid system status indicators (blue: EV mode, amber: ICE mode, red: boost active)**.
